name: Baked Onion Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the contents of the onion soup mix envelope using a rolling pin.
2. Combine the crushed soup mix, bread crumbs, and 1/2 teaspoon of pepper on wax paper.
3. In a shallow dish, beat together the egg and 2 tablespoons of water.
4. Dip each chicken breast half into the egg mixture, then coat with the crumb mixture, shaking off any excess crumbs.
5. Place the coated chicken breasts on a baking sheet.
6. Drizzle the chicken with the melted butter.
7. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink.
